title: tiquilia mexicana
intro: Tiquilia mexicana, also known as Creeping Four O'Clock, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Mexican medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tiquilia mexicana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a valuable herbal remedy for skin and respiratory issues. Tiquilia mexicana is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a salve or ointment, highlighting its versatility in herbal preparations.
